name: add_django_crud
avoid: do not bypass Django ORM with raw SQL
brief_template:
To add a CRUD feature in Django:
1. Add model to models.py with fields and Meta options
2. Register model in admin.py if admin UI needed
3. Create serializer in serializers.py (DRF) or use forms
4. Add view: class-based (ListView, DetailView) or DRF ViewSet
5. Wire URL in urls.py
6. Add tests in tests.py using Django TestCase or pytest-django
